description: Pre-built workflow templates optimized for model routing. Fast tasks use mini models for speed/cost; complex tasks escalate to full models only when needed.

templates.name: Quick DevOps Check
templates.description: Fast status check: git state, recent commits, deploy health. Uses mini model for speed.

steps.label: Check repository and deploy status
steps.objective: Run git status, list recent commits (last 5), check for uncommitted changes, report branch state. Summarize in 3-5 bullet points.

templates.name: CI Failure Triage
templates.description: Fast CI failure analysis. Mini model scans logs; escalates to full model only if repair is needed.

steps.label: Scan CI failure logs
steps.objective: List recent failed workflow runs, fetch job logs for the most recent failure, classify failure type (build-error, test-failure, config-drift, infra-flake). Report root cause summary.

steps.label: Deep diagnosis (if needed)
steps.objective: If failure classification is build-error or test-failure, perform full root cause analysis with file-level tracing and fix proposal.

templates.name: Bug Triage
templates.description: Quick scoping with mini model, then full model for root cause if needed.

steps.label: Scope and reproduce
steps.objective: Search codebase for relevant files, check recent changes in the area, gather error context. Classify severity (critical/high/medium/low) and identify affected components.

steps.label: Root cause analysis
steps.objective: Trace the bug to root cause. Identify the specific code path, propose fix approach, and list affected tests.

steps.label: Verify release artifacts
steps.objective: Check latest release workflow run. Verify all expected artifacts exist, have non-zero size, and release assets are accessible. Report any missing or broken downloads.
